name: Sorrel-Chive Herb Paste (Pesto)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the sorrel and dry it well, by hand or in a salad spinner. Chop the sorrel coarsely, and again squeeze away any liquid.
2. Blend the sorrel, shallots, pine nuts, parsley, chives, orange peel and onion in a food processor or blender. (If using a blender, make sure these ingredients are already finely chopped.)
3. Add dry mustard, salt, pepper and cayenne, and mix again. Slowly drizzle in the oil while the blade is moving.
4. Transfer to tempered glass jars and store in refrigerator (for up to 8 to 10 weeks) or in the freezer for up to a year.
